programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Fly By"
programme.desc: Wardens set up a check station in Region 5. When the hunters decide to run it the chase is on.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "King of the Tundra"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 King of the Tundra
programme.desc: Casey downs a huge bull near the river. Another bull approaches, leading to a tense standoff across the river.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "The Day After"
programme.desc: On the heels of killing a giant bull, Chris and Casey get the 1500 pound moose quartered just before darkness falls and build a meat cache to preserve food rations for the rest of the journey.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "Return Home"
programme.desc: Casey's bull speeds downstream, out of sight. Anticipation rises as they round the bend. Chris spots it washed up near white water on a gravel flat.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WORLDS COLLIDE"
programme.desc: The rough season is starting to wear on commercial fishermen. For some, hard feelings are boiling to the surface and others turn imagination into money.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "FISHING IS NOT FAIR"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 FISHING IS NOT FAIR
programme.desc: The desire and competition for catching fish is at an all time high but fishing is anything but fair.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Argentina"
programme.desc: Dropped into Argentina’s brutal Mitre Peninsula, Les Stroud battles peat bogs and erratic weather to survive seven days in an abandoned wasteland.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Hawaii Access - Shane Dorian"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Hawaii Access - Shane Dorian
programme.desc: The Axis deer populations in Hawaii have reached plague proportions and they are in-fact invasive to this beautifully pristine archipelago of the pacific. Luckily for Mario these deer also happen to boast the best tasting venison.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Talking Turkey - Frank Stallone"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Talking Turkey - Frank Stallone
programme.desc: Mario links up with Frank Stallone and ventures off to Kansas in search of Eastern turkeys.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "Gran Canaria - Part One"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Gran Canaria - Part One
programme.desc: Thom hunt challenges himself to locate a rare Mirror Carp in stunning Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "Gran Canaria - Part Two"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Gran Canaria - Part Two
programme.desc: Thom hunt challenges himself to fish wild Tuna in stunning Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "Norway"
programme.desc: Thom Hunt challenges himself to fish for Cod in picturesque Norway in freezing conditions.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "Silver Kings"
programme.desc: The group of iconic anglers reunite for a week of fishing & camaraderie in Belize. Bill Klyn & Tom McGuane fish for snook, Lori-Ann Murphy & Zach Gilford go after bonefish & Michael Keaton & Tom Brokaw pursue permit & tarpon.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Monster Bass in the Dead of Winter"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Monster Bass in the Dead of Winter
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe fights icy conditions and frozen rods as he hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in early January on Lake Chickamuga, Tennessee.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Largemouth of Grassy Florida"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Largemouth of Grassy Florida
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in these untouched grassy waters.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Road Warrior"
programme.desc: Wardens set up a decoy to stop road hunting in Region 7. It's not long before they catch a shooter.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Last Hurrah"
programme.desc: A veteran warden works his last season. Wardens look back at the decorated career of one of the best.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "TOWNSHIP POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: Rio de Janeiro’s beaches draw tourists, but beyond the picture postcard imagery lies a harsher reality—favelas ruled by drug gangs. To reclaim these areas, the government deployed BOPE, an elite police force taking the fight to the streets since 2008.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "NARCOTRAFFIC POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: As one of the world’s top cocaine producers, Peru is a magnet for global drug cartels. To combat the trade at its source, the elite anti-narcotics unit Sinchi was formed—taking the fight deep into the heart of production zones.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Hell has a Name"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Hell has a Name
programme.desc: The journeys to Base Camp and to sheep camp are highlighted.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Backcountry Ice Man - Chuck Lidell"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Backcountry Ice Man - Chuck Lidell
programme.desc: Former UFC Lightweight Champion and Hall of Famer Chuck Liddell and Mario take on the mountain tops of Idaho on horseback. The two are on a search for a mysterious piece of protein.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "OLD & NEW FACES"
programme.desc: Rick Johnson returns to fishing alone after spending three weeks with Jedd's crew. Two new faces join Bottom Feeders: commercial fisherman and fish market owner, Jeff and his friend Steve.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Into The High Lonesome"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Into The High Lonesome
programme.desc: Modern day Mountain Man Laramy Miller sets out on the trail to experience life in the high lonesome.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Camp Otis"
programme.desc: Life at Camp Otis. Laramy finds success fishing and foraging, and spends his time taking care of 7 and doing camp chores.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Relocation"
programme.desc: Laramy realizes that game is scarce because of the wolves and he decides to put some distance between himself and the pack. Time to break down camp and move to a new location.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "The Broads"
programme.desc: Thom hunt is challenged to hunt the mighty Pike in the Uk’s Norfolk Broads.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Grenada Island"
programme.desc: Stranded on Frigate Island, Les Stroud battles fierce Caribbean waves and isolation to find water and food among prickly cacti and nesting birds.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "UK"
programme.desc: Thom hunt challenges himself to locate and catch four UK species in one week.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Three Kings Redemption"
programme.desc: After a break of dawn beach launch off the tip of 90 Mile Beach, the team punch north to the legendary Three Kings Islands, home to dozens of record calibre fish, and in the process, bag a couple of new records for themselves.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "The Rock"
programme.desc: The Spearo team are in the deep South this week, departing Bluff for a couple of days diving the pristine waters of Stewart Island, but will the brief weather window allow them to make the notorious steam all the way to remote Solander Island?

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Far North Bluewater Mission"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Far North Bluewater Mission
programme.desc: 60 nautical miles + 200kg of Burley divided by 3 keen spearos = mayhem. The team go wide this week, overnighting aboard The Orca in 1000m of water in the Far North, in an attempt to create a 24-hour trail capable of attracting in who knows what!

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "TOURIST POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: With one of the highest homicide rates in the world, Acapulco sees 104 murders per 100,000 people. In this deadly environment, a special anti-crime unit puts their lives on the line daily to keep the city from descending into chaos.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "EUROPEAN POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: In the multicultural hubs of Paris and London, tensions can run high. It’s up to the police to bridge differences and keep the peace—working daily to protect some of Europe’s busiest capitals.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "WOMEN POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: In Hyderabad, India, wealth and poverty coexist side by side. Each day, 15,000 officers battle crime ranging from theft to interreligious violence. In Palestine, 8,500 police face an even tougher challenge—working across a fragmented, politically tense landscape where every patrol carries risk.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Chamois"
programme.desc: This story is about the mountain, unspoiled nature, the hunt for silence, and some very agile goats.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Become NatureWise"
programme.desc: The organization's mission is to develop children's nature identity and understanding of nature by disseminating nature, hunting, and angling, plus cooking from nature pantries of plants, fish, and wild game.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Argentina"
programme.desc: Dropped into Argentina’s brutal Mitre Peninsula, Les Stroud battles peat bogs and erratic weather to survive seven days in an abandoned wasteland.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Grenada Island"
programme.desc: Stranded on Frigate Island, Les Stroud battles fierce Caribbean waves and isolation to find water and food among prickly cacti and nesting birds.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "Ken Henderson Story"
programme.desc: Best friends, Ed Cohen and Ken Henderson, set out for two days of Texas gulf fishing. Tragedy strikes and the two men are stranded adrift in hostile waters.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "C.J. Wickersham Story"
programme.desc: This week, we'll hear the harrowing tale of C.J. Wickersham who will fight to survive a shark attack while spear fishing.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "Jamey Mosch"
programme.desc: This week on Trip Gone Bad, we're following hunter Jamey Mosch into the Florida everglades as his hunting trips turns into a 4 day nightmare.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "White Death"
programme.desc: Snow, what the mountain men called white death, stops Laramy in his tracks. In addition, his trusty horse Seven has suffered a leg injury. Laramy must take care of Seven, battle through hunger, and survive the snowfall.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "The Struggle"
programme.desc: Laramy remains stuck at Camp Hell Hole, nursing 7's leg, and struggling to survive in the freezing temperatures without food.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "On the Move"
programme.desc: Laramy and 7 leave camp Hell Hole and hit the trail again. They are headed for lower elevation in search of a more permanent place to call home.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Hawaii Access - Shane Dorian"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Hawaii Access - Shane Dorian
programme.desc: The Axis deer populations in Hawaii have reached plague proportions and they are in-fact invasive to this beautifully pristine archipelago of the pacific. Luckily for Mario these deer also happen to boast the best tasting venison.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Talking Turkey - Frank Stallone"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Talking Turkey - Frank Stallone
programme.desc: Mario links up with Frank Stallone and ventures off to Kansas in search of Eastern turkeys.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Backcountry Ice Man - Chuck Lidell"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Backcountry Ice Man - Chuck Lidell
programme.desc: Former UFC Lightweight Champion and Hall of Famer Chuck Liddell and Mario take on the mountain tops of Idaho on horseback. The two are on a search for a mysterious piece of protein.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "1,000 Tuna Quest"
programme.desc: Mario travels to the outer limits of the Eastern Coast of Canada to a place called Prince Edward Island. Home to some of the biggest bluefin tuna on the planet, these fish can grow up to 1,000 pounds.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "Grey Ghosts"
programme.desc: The team of anglers cast into the flats off the coast of Belize in pursuit of bonefish. Tom Brokaw & Bill Klyn casts from a boat, McGuane & Yvon Chouninard try their luck wading & Michael Keaton & Lori-Ann Murphy use both methods.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "The Backcast"
programme.desc: The group of anglers continue their weekend of fishing out of El Pescador Lodge & the Belize River Lodge. ~Tom McGuane experiences a memorable fight with a giat tarpon & we join up with angling legend Stu Apte in Florida.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Monster Bass in Shallow Grass"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Monster Bass in Shallow Grass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in this shallow lake full of grass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Western Florida Monster Bass"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Western Florida Monster Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in this forgotten lake in western Florida.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Ghost of Transylvania"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Ghost of Transylvania
programme.desc: Climbing the wild peaks in the story riddled the Carpathian Mountains, home to the most famous hunter of all, Dracula!

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Bavarian Wolf in Hungary"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Bavarian Wolf in Hungary
programme.desc: Journey to the rolling hills of Balaton Lake in Hungary and explore the possibilities of recreating a biodiverse agricultural future with an avid hunter.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Saddles Sores"
programme.desc: Leaving sheep country on a high, the men face a daunting 22-hour trail ride to Tom-Tom, the first moose camp. Two days of riding loom a head before reaching their destination. However, trouble strikes just eight hours into the journey.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Church on the Mountain"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Church on the Mountain
programme.desc: In the Yukon, decisions are pivotal and amplified in its rugged terrain. The brothers close in on a giant grizzly, now within 500 yards, with the decision lying in Chris's hands.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "Craig Hutto"
programme.desc: A family fishing trip turns into a bloody nightmare and leaves Craig Hutto fighting for his life.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "Ron Smith Story"
programme.desc: This week, it's the true story of Ron Smith's encounter with a fearless deer that attacked both him and his nephew, Arik, while out fishing.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Permanent Residence"
programme.desc: Laramy and 7 find a long term camping spot out of the snow and at a lower elevation. Laramy gets to work making a more permanent shelter and looking for food.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Focused on Food"
programme.desc: Laramy locates some whitetail deer and focuses his efforts on hunting them.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Thriving"
programme.desc: Stocked up on food, Laramy and 7 thrive at their new location. Laramy focuses on building some amenities to make life easier on The Trail.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Fight or Flight"
programme.desc: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep control of the craft and keep their passengers safe.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Deadman's Survival"
programme.desc: Island Air battles time and elements, to rescue a group trapped in Deadman's Bay.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Grenada Island"
programme.desc: Stranded on Frigate Island, Les Stroud battles fierce Caribbean waves and isolation to find water and food among prickly cacti and nesting birds.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Grenada Jungle"
programme.desc: Scaling the misty heights of Grenada’s "Cloud Forest," Les Stroud avoids toxic plants and hunts for survival food while hauling 50 pounds of gear.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "The Lateral Line"
programme.desc: Old friends Michael Keaton & Tom McGuane share a boat together, which means there will be plenty of action & plenty of laughts. Bonefish & Tarpon Trust's Aaron Adams helps Zach Gilford dance with a tarpon for the first time.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "Rising Tides"
programme.desc: Off the coast of Belize, the group of anglers continue their pursuit of bonefish & tarpon. Michael Keaton & Zach Gilford chase tarpon, while Bill Klyn & Yvon Chouinard are after bone. We also share a boat with Aaron Adams & Tom McGuane.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "Fighting Fish"
programme.desc: Angling experts Lori-Ann Murphy & Aaron Adams prove that catching a tarpon is no easy feat as they try to land a silver king in the Florida Keys. Dr. Jerry Ault discusses the research underway as scientists try to unravel the mysteries of these fish.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Driven in France"
programme.desc: Rich in abundance and history, the hills around Kayserberg, Alsace, are full of wildlife. Two friends set out to build a system to share that abundance with the rest of France, from forest to fork!

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Follow the Fallow"
programme.desc: After two years of anticipation, fallow deer can finally be hunted on new hunting grounds on top of the Italian Apennine mountains.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Feathers & Fur"
programme.desc: The wind is constantly blowing from the West on the island of Fanø in Denmark. Take the ferry to over, to hunt woodcock and rabbits with Jesper, his dog, and his ferret.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Valley of Snow"
programme.desc: Snow relentlessly pounds the Keefer brothers at Church Camp, reducing visibility to an all-time low. They're snowed in with timetable to resume the hunt, as many problems start to surface.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "End of the Line"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 End of the Line
programme.desc: As the bull responds to the calls, Chris hears but can't see it, while Casey can. Their attempts to communicate via signals falter as the bull vanishes over the mountain's peak, out of sight.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Divide & Conquer"
programme.desc: Chris needs to make this happen. With willows to high to attempt a shot from the current location, Chris frantically pushes and closes the distance to 300 yards.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "Jackson Jordon"
programme.desc: This week, we'll visit with Jackson Jordan and his narrow escape from death in the woods of Georgia after an attack from a pack of coyotes when he was only 16.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "Mischelle Hileman"
programme.desc: This week, Mischelle Hileman finds herself deep in the Oregon wilderness on an elk hunt when she gets lost, injured, and on the brink of death.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S1 - "The Rick Collins Story"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 The Rick Collins Story
programme.desc: This week on Trip Gone Bad, a father and son set out on a cliff side sheep hunt, but one slip could mean life or death in this remote and unforgiving area.

programme.title: The Trail S1 - "Return Home"
programme.desc: Laramy and 7 say goodbye to their final camp and head home.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Carnival"
programme.desc: Rio’s Carnival—a week of samba and celebrations—often sends many to the ER. At Barcelona’s La Mercè Festival, first aid stations care for the injured, sick, and intoxicated.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Desperate Times"
programme.desc: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Grenada Jungle"
programme.desc: Scaling the misty heights of Grenada’s "Cloud Forest," Les Stroud avoids toxic plants and hunts for survival food while hauling 50 pounds of gear.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S3 - "Like Father, Like Son"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: In Cordoba, Argentina doves and pigeons are considered to be in plague proportions and culling them is necessary to maintain balance in the region... however, things turn a little competitive when Mario brings his dad to help.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S3 - "Iberia Truffle Ibex"
programme.desc: Mario finds the help of a local Spanish baker to lead him high into the Becite mountain after Iberian Ibex, but he must first forage for truffles in order to make a European style pasta with the offal of this cagey mountain goat.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S3 - "Wild West Atacama"
programme.desc: Mario ventures into the Atacama desert of Chile, where the volatile land filled with volcanic mountains and unforgiving terrain becomes a brutal mission that leaves him repelling down massive waterfalls to discover active puma dens.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day One Pt. 1"
programme.desc: Day one begins as the four 2-man teams blast off from Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West with nine different cameras rolling on all the action including helicopter and underwater cameras.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day One Pt. 2"
programme.desc: Day one continues as the four teams search for huge hungry sharks in the beautiful waters of the coast of Key West, Florida.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Two Pt. 1"
programme.desc: Day two of the Madfin Shark Series begins, as it's becoming clearer which of our four 2-man teams will have to do whatever it takes to not be in last place & being eliminated. Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West sees the sharks finding captains idle.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "MEDITERRANEAN - HARBOUR POLICE PATROLS"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 MEDITERRANEAN - HARBOUR POLICE PATROLS
programme.desc: In Catalonia, the regional police have taken over from Spain’s national force, deploying a rapid-response motorcycle unit to tackle urban crime. Meanwhile in Haifa, Israel’s main port city, police operate under strict laws in a tense environment shaped by terrorism threats and ongoing regional conflict.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "RIVER POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: In Brazil, the Paraná River is a major trafficking route—patrolled by NEPOM, a specialized river police unit. In Guayaquil, Ecuador, police join forces with local communities to combat all forms of trafficking on the ground.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada raskaan kaluston vuorelle ennen kuin tulvivat joet katkaisevat pääsyn kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Ilmassa on jännitettä, kun miehistö yrittää saada raskasta kalustoa mutaiselle, lohkareiden peittämälle 120 kilometrin pituiselle polulle perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksen vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää saada koneensa kulkemaan vyöryvien jokien yli perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksensa vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan on vakuuttunut siitä, että Dynastyn alueella veden täyttämän kuopan alla on jadea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin yrittää uhmata fysiikan lakeja saadakseen massiivisen uuden kasarmin Wolverinen alueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn porukkaa koettelee huono onni, ja jokainen keksii ainutlaatuisia ratkaisuja huonon onnen karkottamiseksi.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaikki innostuvat, kun he vihdoin alkavat kaivaa esiin lupaavia vihreitä lohkareita, joiden miehistö uskoo olevan miljoonien arvoisia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun ulkomaiset sijoittajat piipahtavat yllättäen tarkistamaan Wolverinen kaivosalueen töitä, ja Alan yrittää rauhoittaa tilannetta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Wolverinen kaivoksella vihdoin löydetään lupaavia lohkareita, miehistö huomaa, että he ovat saattaneet mennä tonttinsa rajojen ulkopuolelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitys kasvaa, kun kaivoskauden loppu lähestyy, ja Jade Cityn miehistö haluaa löytää kallisarvoisen lohkareen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn kaivostyöläiset yrittävät löytää rikkauksia - tarpeeksi suuren jadelohkareen, joka tekee vaikutuksen sijoittajiin - ennen kauden päättymistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian ja Robinin testaamattomat koneet alkavat hajota raa'alla matkalla Wolverinen kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää ylittää tulvivia jokia matkalla kaivokselle koneet mukanaan, mutta Josh jää jälkeen ongelmallisen kaivinkoneen takia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh jää jumiin pitkällä matkalla Wolverinen kaivokselle, kun pultit irtoavat kaivinkoneesta eikä hän voi kutsua apua.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaivoskausi alkaa, ja vaikka jadea ei näy, rekkaonnettomuus tuo Jade Citylle onnea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Guysta tulee Wolverinen johtaja, ja uuden työntekijän palkkaaminen uhkaa suistaa hänen tehtävänsä löytää kauden ensimmäinen jadelohkare.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Juuri kun Wolverinen miehistö tehostaa turvallisuusmenetelmiään, uusi työntekijä Jay romahtaa, mikä paljastaa heidän hätävalmiutensa säröt.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh käyttää uutta kaivinkonetta, kun taas arvottomien kivien kasa saa Claudian harkitsemaan uutta strategiaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan tuo Jade Cityyn ostajaryhmän, mikä saa Claudian tiimin paniikkiin ja etsimään kauden ensimmäiset myytävät jadelohkareet.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun miehistö rämpii mudassa etsiessään miljoonan dollarin arvoista lohkaretta, Josh riskeeraa puolen miljoonan dollarin arvoisen kaluston yrittäessään vetää rekkaansa pois vajoamasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Tiimi löytää kauden parhaan jadelohkareen, mutta on vaarassa heikentää sen arvoa, kun he yrittävät leikata kaikki halkeamat pois.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian poika Justin osoittaa, että hän osaa löytää jadea, kun taas Scrappy Larry, Robin ja Josh kamppailevat hinaamaan rikkinäisen autonsa Wolverinelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Huonot tulokset pakottavat Robinin ja Justinin viimeiseen yritykseen etsiä jadekiviä pelastaakseen kauden, kun taas Scrappy Larry kiirehtii muuntamaan dieselillä toimivan säiliön.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian hanke majoittaa työryhmä Jade Cityyn vaarantuu, kun saostussäiliö vuotaa juomaveteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kylmän sään saapuessa aikaisin ja velkojen kasaantuessa miehistö työntää, vetää ja raahaa mammuttimaisen ja mahdollisesti kauden pelastavan lohkareen leirille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun vuoden lupaavinta lohkaretta työstetään Wolverinella, Josh ja R2 kolaroivat rekka-autonsa, ja Claudia tiimineen jäävät ymmälleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kilpailu on käynnissä, jotta Wolverinen leiristä päästään pois ennen kuin kaikki jää lumen alle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia joutuu ajamaan kiviautoa, kun hänen miehistönsä kamppailee kivistä polkua ylös Wolverinen vuorenhuipulla sijaitsevaan leiriin.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada ihmisiä ja varusteita syrjäiseen leiriinsä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia ja Robin yrittävät tehdä vaikutuksen uusiin liikekumppaneihinsa, mutta ensimmäiset päivät uudella alueellaan Bullion Creekissä ovat turhauttavia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivoksesta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivokselta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Elokuun hurjan lumimyrskyn takia Claudian ja Robinin on pakko jäädä 2 Mileen, kun taas Gary ja Garon yrittävät pelastaa tilanteen ajamalla myrskyn läpi ja tuomalla heille tarvikkeita.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin tekee vaikean päätöksen rakkaan kaivosautonsa Six packin suhteen toisen kalliiksi tulleen rikkoutumisen jälkeen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Talven lähestyessä Claudia ajaa uupuneen miehistönsä murtumispisteeseen, mikä saa kiihkon leimahtamaan ja pakottaa Claudian viimein hyväksymään tappionsa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Uusi kaivoskausi on täynnä ikäviä yllätyksiä, mutta epätodennäköinen tapahtuma pelastaa tilanteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh on kyllästynyt työskentelemään isälleen, joten hän perustaa oman kuorma-autoyrityksensä uudella rekalla.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Armeijan kuorma-auto hajoaa julmalla tiellä kaivokselle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Gary ja poikansa pelastavat vanhan armeijan kuorma-auton, mutta sen ajaminen kaivokselle on raakaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Garon ja Josh menettävät Six packin hallinnan mutaisilla teillä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Justin lentää paikalle uuden vaijerisahan kanssa, mutta menettää malttinsa yrittäessään asentaa sitä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö kohtaa loputtomasti ongelmia yrittäessään leikata palan 18 metrin pituisesta linssistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia tuo paikalle ison porauskaluston, ja hänellä on vain neljä päivää aikaa löytää paras jadepaikka, mutta hän ja Robin eivät osaa päättää, mistä etsiä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehet ottavat yhteen, kun he loppukauden kiireet pakottavat heidät työskentelemään kahdessa kaivoksessa yhtä aikaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö irrottaa jadelohkareita J-linssistä, mutta iso ongelma tiellä uhkaa kaikkea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Claudia ja Robini etsivät jadea poraamalla tuloksetta, edes yhtiön geologit eivät pääse yksimielisyyteen suunnitelmasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada raskaan kaluston vuorelle ennen kuin tulvivat joet katkaisevat pääsyn kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: The Friday FeelGood 50!

programme.title: 30 Rock & Indie Heroes of the 10s
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 30 Rock & Indie Heroes of the 10s
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?

programme.title: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving in to their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Gatra Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Gatra Beach conservation is one of the remote destinations in nature that has much to offer.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: A visual and audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. 60 different one-minute scenes of nature, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: A visual and audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. 60 different one-minute scenes of nature, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Gisborne & Lake Twizel: New Zealand
programme.desc: Taking in Gisborne's tranquil cliff-lined coastlines, driftwood, and rushing waves; going lakeside in the Twizel region to explore snow-covered mountain ranges and the calm surface of the lake waters.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxtion in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: Blindspots S1 - "New York City"
programme.desc: How does the bustling island of steel and stone fare for those with disabilities? James sets out to discover what it's like to travel blind in the Big Apple.

programme.title: City Beats S1 - "Europe"
programme.desc: DJ and house music producer Carly Foxx looks back at her journey to the music dance capitals of Europe to inspire her final track.

programme.title: Breaking Beyond S1 - "Tokyo, Japan"
programme.desc: Vegas Bboy Ronnie is traveling to Japan to visit Bboy Shigekix in his hometown Tokyo. Shigekix will take Ronnie on an exciting Journey to show the Japanese culture and it's unique style of breaking and hip-hop.

programme.title: Breaking Beyond S1 - "Rotterdam, The Netherlands"
programme.desc: In the city of Rotterdam, three times world champion, Menno, hosts b-boy Junior from France. Both are considered legends. Menno takes Junior on a trip he will never forget and meet people who have all left their mark in the Dutch breaking community.

programme.title: The Streets S1 - "Detroit"
programme.desc: Punk rocker Jon-Mikal formed his band The Idiot Kids as a way to deal with his sexuality. After coming out to his family at 21, he uses writing and his stage performance as a form of therapy.

programme.title: DownieLive Travels By Train S1 - "Alberta"
programme.desc: Michael visits an Alberta ranch, sees the snowy Rockies, stays at a rail hotel, and visits the Badlands and a giant mall.

programme.title: DownieLive Travels By Train S1 - "British Columbia"
programme.desc: Michael visits BC for a canoe tour, joins a rescue team on a hovercraft, plays pond hockey, and takes his final train trip.

programme.title: Journey Within S1 - "Joshua Tree"
programme.desc: In Joshua Tree, Gabi shared astrology insights, Alchemy provided sound healing, and Marilia discovered spiritual connection. Guide Andrew introduced mindfulness, Doug showcased grounding through sprouting, concluding with reflection in hot springs.

programme.title: Journey Within S1 - "LA"
programme.desc: In LA, we hike with wolfs, Ayurveda insights with Jay and a delicious meal from Karla. Marilia takes an adventurous leap from an airplane, showing the freedom in extreme sports.Tracy showcases the joy of pursuing passions with WCMX at the skate park.

programme.title: A Simple Path S3 - "Philadelphia"
programme.desc: Yann immerses himself in Philadelphia's skateboarding culture. He explores Nocturnal Skate Shop eats a Philly cheesesteak, visits Cloud 9 pottery studio, admires Adam's art collection, skates with Celina, and experiences the creativity of FDR.

programme.title: A Simple Path S3 - "St. Petersburg"
programme.desc: Yann explores St. Petersburg's skateboarding community, visiting Anchor Skate shop and meeting Jay Turner, Kris Markovitch, Jake White, Naomi Glueck, Evan Starkey, and Alex Charos. He highlights creativity, self-expression, and the vibrant community.

programme.title: A Simple Path S3 - "Phoenix"
programme.desc: Yann delves into Phoenix's diverse skateboarding scene, exploring Cowtown Skateboards. Meeting Hendren a sfashion designer, Christians band, Garnak, Triple paint designs, Justin a blacksmith and Douglas Miles Jr the owner of Apache skateboards.

programme.title: Blindspots S1 - "London"
programme.desc: James heads across the pond to discover what life for a blind traveler is like in a world capital like London.

programme.title: Blindspots S1 - "United Kingdom"
programme.desc: Escaping the hustle and bustle of the big city, James takes the train to visit the rest of England - proving the rest of England is more accessible than one might think.

programme.title: Capturing Winter S1 - "Martin Bochatay and Arthur Maneint"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Martin Bochatay and Arthur Maneint
programme.desc: Martin and Arthur are two of the world’s best FPV drone pilots. Now the duo team up with pro skier and Olympic medalist, Kevin Rolland, for a unique project ; mount a cinema camera on a racing drone and attempt to film some never-before-seen action.

programme.title: DownieLive Travels By Train S1 - "Alberta"
programme.desc: Michael visits an Alberta ranch, sees the snowy Rockies, stays at a rail hotel, and visits the Badlands and a giant mall.

programme.title: DownieLive Travels By Train S1 - "British Columbia"
programme.desc: Michael visits BC for a canoe tour, joins a rescue team on a hovercraft, plays pond hockey, and takes his final train trip.

programme.title: Australia's Amazing Homes S1 - "Inspired Design"
programme.desc: Architects get their inspiration for their designs from literally everywhere. Johanna and Pete discover some truly unorthodox architecture that has been inspired from surprising places.

programme.title: Australia's Amazing Homes S1 - "Urban Castles"
programme.desc: Take a look at contemporary urban architecture through 6 very different styles. Each luxurious home has been built within suburban neighbourhoods but that’s where the similarity ends.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - "The Journey Begins"
programme.desc: Overcoming illness and the chaos of bustling Chennai city traffic, Jess rides with a diverse group through vibrant coastal towns, before venturing inland toward the mountains and the sacred town of Palani.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - "A Rough Ride"
programme.desc: Jess and her riders face challenges heading to Kodaikanal, forced to confront landslides, ride through rough terrain and make decisions on the fly. Crossing into Kerala and reaching the iconic tea fields, the gang is rewarded with an elephant sighting and a new addition to their ride crew in Munnar.

programme.title: Khanh Ong's Wild Food S1 - "Nywaigi Country"
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong journeys to Australia’s tropical Far North Queensland to discover the culinary secrets of the Nywaigi people, the traditional owners of the land. In this episode he learns to cook Magpie Goose with Nywaigi Man Buddy Cassidy.

programme.title: The Delinquent Gourmet S1 - "Belize"
programme.desc: Gord is in Dangriga, Belize to explore the country's unique melting pot of African, Spanish and Caribbean cuisines. Taking to the streets, he tastes the wares of vendor after vendor - Johnnycakes, tamales, garnaches - Belize's heavenly taco. And then at the Dangriga market, our Delinquent Gourmet discovers varieties of fish he's never even heard of!

programme.title: The Streets S1 - "Las Vegas"
programme.desc: Las Vegas is home to a hot rod car club community which over the decades has been connected to the rise of rockabilly music. Through Luke Metz and his band, Shanda & The Howlers, we learn how this bond between fashion, music and cars was created.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie S4 - "Maldives Part 2"
programme.desc: Sashi explores Maldives’ top luxury resorts, from underground wine cellars to sandbar dinners and underwater restaurants—culinary luxury at its peak.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie S4 - "Seychelles"
programme.desc: Sashi explores Seychelles’ beaches, octopus curry, and island-fresh seafood—from Mahe to remote Desroches—for a true taste of paradise.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie S4 - "Maldives / Soneva Jani"
programme.desc: At Soneva Jani, Sashi experiences ultra-luxury dining—from crab curry to surprise chef’s tables and sunset BBQs in the Maldives’ most iconic resort.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S1 - "Turmeric"
programme.desc: Journey alongside Lauren as she delves into the vibrant world of turmeric. From infusing it into dishes like Urap Pakis to crafting a healthful elixir called Jamu, discover the captivating flavors against the breathtaking backdrop of Mount Agung.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S1 - "Nut"
programme.desc: Join Lauren on a culinary adventure with various nuts as she discovers their potential beyond snacking and incorporates them into Italian and Balinese recipes like Cashew cheese, mouthwatering Cabonara and more delightful flavors.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S1 - "Coconut"
programme.desc: Explore the boundless potential of coconuts with Lauren as she reinvents a calamari dish using coconut flesh, offering a taste experience that will leave you in awe and redefine your culinary perceptions.

programme.title: Taste of France S1 - "Eric Trochon – Solstice"
programme.desc: Today we’ll visit the wonderful city of Paris and the restaurant of Eric Trochon - Solstice - an informal yet elegant restaurant awarded with a Michelin star.

programme.title: Taste of France S1 - "Pascal Barbot - Astrance"
programme.desc: In today’s program we will visit the star-chef Pascal Barbot, who became independent at age twenty-seven. Reservations at his 2 star Michelin-awarded restaurant Astrance are booked months ahead.

programme.title: Taste of France S1 - "Daniel Barratier – L’Auberge Sur-les-Bois"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Daniel Barratier – L’Auberge Sur-les-Bois
programme.desc: Daniel Barratier has worked with some of the best chefs traveling the world, now he’s back in his hometown, Annecy, the ”Venice of the French Alps" were he invested in a true fine dining restaurant.

programme.title: Sweet Planet S1 - "Sweetness in Nature"
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates the diversity and complexity of sweetness and also shows us that nature itself is the greatest brewer, reminding us to return to nature and enjoy the pure sweetness in life.

programme.title: Sweet Planet S1 - "Sweetness in the Family"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Sweetness in the Family
programme.desc: Cakes, maple syrup and taro puree tell a story of inheritance, memory and innovation in different parts of the world. They demonstrate how food can become a symbol of cultural identity and family heritage.

programme.title: Sweet Planet S1 - "Sweetness Migration"
programme.desc: The program reveals the unique attraction of sweet food that allows it to transcend geographical boundaries to become a bond shared worldwide, a form of cultural expression, and a means of heritage prevention.

programme.title: Foodwise S1 - "Quanzhou"
programme.desc: In this episode, Tianran He and Eva May are in Quanzhou, the ancient starting point of the Maritime Silk Road. From its covered arcades and Roman columns to its Southeast Asian vibe, our hosts discover that Quanzhou truly is a melting pot of cultures

programme.title: Foodwise S1 - "Xi'an"
programme.desc: In this episode, Tianran He and Eva May venture to Xi'an, an ancient city with over 3000 years of history, capital to 13 Chinese dynasties. But first, our hosts are going to carb load on street food, from glutinous rice cakes.

programme.title: Foodwise S1 - "Datong"
programme.desc: Tianran He and Angela Fu are in historic Datong. Located in northern China's Shanxi Province, some 1500 years ago Datong was the capital of the Northern Wei Dynasty, which saw nomads unite northern China and Buddhism spread throughout the country.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie S4 - "Mauritius Part 1"
programme.desc: Sashi explores Mauritius from street food to luxury resorts, tasting rum, meeting top chefs, and uncovering why this island is a rising global hotspot

programme.title: Maximum Foodie S4 - "Mauritius Part 2"
programme.desc: Sashi dives into Mauritius’ food scene—street eats, rum, top chefs, and luxury escapes—showing why this island is becoming a must-visit destination.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S1 - "Banana"
programme.desc: Indulge in the versatile world of bananas as Lauren skillfully crafts recipes, from banana flour sourdough bread to twist-infused pancakes, offering a tantalizing experience that showcases the endless possibilities of this humble fruit.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S1 - "Potato"
programme.desc: Lauren explores the culinary possibilities of the humble potato. She demonstrates how to make perfect crispy potato wedges, a hearty potato and vegetable curry, and homemade gnocchi recipe that is hard to beat.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali S1 - "Tofu"
programme.desc: Discover the delicious and nutritious world of tofu with Lauren as she experiments with various textures and flavors, pushing the soybean to its limits to create amazing dishes like Scramble tofu and the sweet-spicy delight of Tahu Gejrot.

programme.title: Taste of France S1 - "Matthieu Dupuis Baumal – Chateau de la Gaude"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Matthieu Dupuis Baumal – Chateau de la Gaude
programme.desc: In this program we’ll explore the story of the skilled Chef Matthieu Dupuis Baumal, his style of cooking and how he took his team to greatness in only a couple of months! We’ll also visit one of the best olive oil producers in the world.

programme.title: Taste of France S1 - "Amandine Chaignot – Pouliche"
programme.desc: In this program Amandine Chaignot demonstrates the extent of her talent, serving refined vegetarian-focused cuisine. We’ll get to know her secrets for stimulating flavors and the principles behind her raw, refined French cuisine.

programme.title: Taste of France S1 - "Antonin Bonnet – Quinsou"
programme.desc: In this program we’ll get an insight of the importance of quality, as Antonin sources his ingredients with diligence. Making careful use of all elements, his kitchen manages to match sustainability with elegance and excellence.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - "New Crew"
programme.desc: Jess sets off for Palakkad, exploring the region’s lush tea plantations and local tribal villages. As the crew heads into Karnataka, they visit a stunning waterfall and gain more riders along the way. As they continue toward Thirthahalli, Jess receives a phone call that could change everything for her and the group.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - "Collision Chaos"
programme.desc: The ride takes a dramatic turn when Bhaskar totals the support car. With Ridermania just days away, Jess and the team scramble to salvage their journey, redistributing luggage onto their bikes. They push on through Karnataka, reaching Gokarna’s beaches, only for another setback to hit when a rider is caught in a collision.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - "Ridermania"
programme.desc: After a crash leaves Zombie injured, the crew scrambles to stay on schedule for Ridermania. Jess arrives at the festival, participates in events and is met with overwhelming support from fans and fellow riders. The three-day celebration ends with a visit to a famous Goa beach before the crew heads to Ganpatipule.

programme.title: Foodwise S1 - "Chaozhou"
programme.desc: Hosts Tianran He and Angela Fu are in Chaozhou, South China. They're on a quest to discover the secrets of its success, for Chaozhou is famed for its wealthy merchant guilds and its homegrown Teochew cuisine, which enjoys global recognition.

programme.title: Foodwise S2 - "Chongqing"
programme.desc: Welcome to Chongqing, China's largest city. Located in the country's southwest, it straddles two mighty rivers and is famed for its extraordinary skyline, with high-rises mushrooming out of the hills and vertigo-inducing bridges.

programme.title: Foodwise S2 - "Veggie Beijing"
programme.desc: Beijing is a 3000-year old metropolis home to a dizzying array of culinary traditions, not least of which is vegetarian cuisine. For Beijingers, eating vegetarian is the best way to welcome spring. Today, Tianran and Angela take up the challenge.

programme.title: Khanh Ong's Wild Food S1 - "Port Lincoln, SA"
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong Journeys to the rugged coastal town of Port Lincoln, in South Australia to unlock the secrets of the local seafood. From locals, he learns how to trawl for wild prawns, harvest oysters and forages for unique coastal ingredients.

programme.title: Khanh Ong's Wild Food S1 - "Cairns, QLD"
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong travels to Cairns, Australia where he embarks on an adventure to the rainforests of Mission Beach. Learning from locals, he learns how to hunt mud crabs with a spear on the traditional fishing grounds of the Kuku Yalanji people.

programme.title: Khanh Ong's Wild Food S1 - "Eyre Peninsula, SA"
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong travels to the spectacular Eyre Peninsula, South Australia. In shark infested waters he conquers his fears and jumps in to learn how to hunt underwater. From locals he learns how to spear fish and four-wheel drive through sand dunes.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun S1 - "French Harvest"
programme.desc: Vineyard owners start harvesting after years of poor yields while the Spanish bootcamp nears a turning point & dive centre owners make a major announcement.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun S1 - "Costa del Pub"
programme.desc: A couple battles delays opening a seafood restaurant in Spain. Londoners chase their B&B dream in rural France while a Costa del Sol pub gears up for summer crowds.

programme.title: Weekend Breaks with Gregg Wallace S2 - "Venice"
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace spends 3 days in Venice, enjoying great food, stunning sights, and kayaking through the city’s famous canals.

programme.title: Weekend Breaks with Gregg Wallace S2 - "Athens"
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace explores Athens for 3 days, tasting great food, roaming ancient sites, and even performing in a Greek tragedy.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: El Nino S1 - "The Eddie"
programme.desc: The world’s elite big wave surfers revel in the biggest most powerful Waimea Bay surf conditions to ever grace the Eddie Aikau Contest.

programme.title: Luxe Travels S1 - "Bali"
programme.desc: The Luxe Travels season starts off in the beautiful and highly popular tourism hotspot; Bali. The host, Liesel Hlista embarks on a mission to understand how the Balinese blend hospitality with luxury.

programme.title: Luxe Travels S1 - "Ireland"
programme.desc: An uncommon destination for a series that explores exotic tropical getaways. But this island nation has some of the most evocative landscapes that mother nature has to offer!

programme.title: Luxe Travels S1 - "Jamaica"
programme.desc: Easy island vibes, lots of amazing local rum, brilliant natural landscapes and those amazing beaches! Of course,Luxe Travels is in Jamaica! But in this episode, host Liesel Hlista shows you a different side of the Irie nation; away from the hordes of people unleashed via cruise liners!

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S1 - "Desert Survival"
programme.desc: Ash heads into the desert to meet up with Wu Xinlei, who is a survival expert. He’s hoping to understand what it would have been like for the people who built The Great Wall in this remote and punishing landscape.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S1 - "Crescent Lake"
programme.desc: Ash is into the final stretch of his journey along The Great Wall of China. After seeing the building techniques used on the Great Wall, Ash heads into the Gobi Desert to the stunning Cresent Lake – a beautiful oasis between walls of sand.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S1 - "Mission Accomplished"
programme.desc: After meeting an old friend from the Chu Great Wall, Ash visits some beautiful stone structures – both natural and human-made – at Yardang National Park and Xiaofang City. With one final phone call home, it's time to leave The Great Wall of China.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Queensland’s Granite Belt"
programme.desc: Scotty finds his happy place, in Queensland’s Granite Belt, and Alana get’s a taste of Beijing’s old city, before visiting the spice market in Istanbul.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Darwin, Phuket"
programme.desc: David Reyne visits Darwin and the amazing Litchfield National Park, and Scotty takes the road less travelled on an ATV tour of Phuket, before a bit of go-karting on Queenland’s Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "East Timor"
programme.desc: Dave Reyne explores the capitol of East Timor’s Dili, and Alana enjoy a serenade on the river

programme.title: Travel in Style S1 - "BORA BORA & MALDIVES"
programme.desc: Our team stay in a spacious water villa at the Bora Bora Lagoon resort and Spa. A great base for scuba diving, horse riding and deep sea fishing.

programme.title: Travel in Style S1 - "PERU & BRAZIL"
programme.desc: Colca Canyon in Peru, a simply outstanding area of great beauty that has to be seen to believed. And staying in South America for the thrill seekers amongst us we take a powerboat trip and head straight for Iguassu Falls.

programme.title: Travel in Style S1 - "ITALY & PORTUGAL"
programme.desc: This time in Italy we visit the glamorous Amalfi Coast, In Italy. In Portugal, the Algarve with its clear waters and sandstone cliffs this coastline is truly stunning.

programme.title: Jet Set S1 - "Eze (France) V Stockholm"
programme.desc: From the French Riviera, Richard attempts to win the episode from his hotel, where every house in the town is actually a hotel suite. Meanwhile Gill tours the Swedish capital of Stockholm, sailing around the archipelago.

programme.title: Jet Set S1 - "Barcelona V Lake Como"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Barcelona V Lake Como
programme.desc: Both Richard and Gill battle it out with their list of whose who, responsible for putting their locations, Barcelona and Lake Como on the world map.

programme.title: Jet Set S1 - "London V Bangkok"
programme.desc: London versus Bangkok. Helicopter versus tuck tuck. With so much to see and do in each capital city whose method of transport will win Dave’s seal of approval?

programme.title: Weekend Breaks with Gregg Wallace S2 - "Istanbul"
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace discovers Istanbul in 3 days, savoring local flavors, visiting top sights, and trying his hand at kebab making.

programme.title: Weekend Breaks with Gregg Wallace S2 - "Budapest"
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace spends 3 days in Budapest, uncovering its invasion-shaped food culture and exploring the city on foot and by Cold War jeep.

programme.title: Weekend Breaks with Gregg Wallace S2 - "Munich"
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace discovers Munich’s Bavarian food and history over 3 days, revealing how the region helped shape Germany.

programme.title: Luxe Travels S1 - "Puerto Rico"
programme.desc: Liesel explores all the hands-on activities such as riding horseback on the beach, riding ATV’s through the muddy swamps, and hiking through the super lush El Yunque rainforest. Luxurious resorts are only a stone's throw away - hopping islands, Liesel gets to experience the ultra modern and chic El Blok located in Vieques. Between stays at all the luxury boutique resorts, a common trend starts to appear, and that is the island’s cuisine.

programme.title: Luxe Travels S1 - "Hong Kong"
programme.desc: Hong Kong is Asia’s world city and this episode is a complete 360 from the melee of tropical island paradises. Hong Kong is famous for it’s skyscraper strewn skyline and in this episode, local girl Lesley Chiang is on a mission to show a different side of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Luxe Travels S1 - "Belize"
programme.desc: Luxe Travels showcases beautiful Belize; with hundreds of kilometers of coastline with the Caribbean sea, the 2nd largest barrier reef, and one of the best dive sites in the world, how could you not? In this episode, Dani Kristo is on a mission to showcase the best of Belize

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Bangkok"
programme.desc: Alana finds a unique way to explore Budapest and Scotty enjoys a food crawl through Bangkok.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Mad Max museum"
programme.desc: Scotty visits the Mad Max museum in Silverton and David treks to one of Indonesia's spectacular sleeping giants

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Komodo dragon"
programme.desc: David gets close but not too close to the Komodo dragon and I try out a local delicacy.

programme.title: Travel in Style S1 - "JAMAICA & MAURITIUS"
programme.desc: Jamaica, the home of reggae and rum. A quick zoom across to the Indian Ocean we find Mauritius.

programme.title: Travel in Style S1 - "LONDON & SYDNEY"
programme.desc: London - one of the most famous and historic cities in the world. Sydney - the most expensive city in Australia but don't let that put you off!

programme.title: Travel in Style S1 - "BARCELONA & BERLIN"
programme.desc: Barcelona, an architectural delight, with real European Style. If you’re looking for an alternative to sun, sea and sand then the urban city of Berlin is the perfect travel destination for you!

programme.title: Mount Wutai, Embracing the Wonders of Nature
programme.desc: Mount Wutai, in the northeastern part of Shanxi Province, is one of the Four Great Buddhist Mountains of China. It is a magnet for tourists, who are drawn here not only by its profound Buddhist cultural heritage, but also by the spectacular natural scenery.Mount Wutai is noted for its unique topography, marked by five flattened peaks. Hence the name "Wutai," or “Five Terraces.” The five, each with its own characteristics and distinct shape, are Wanghai East Peak, Guayue West Peak, Jinxiu South Peak, Yedou North Peak, and Cuiyan Central Peak. Soaring into the clouds, together they resemble a magnificent work crafted by nature.

programme.title: The Yak and the Nomad
programme.desc: Qinghai’s Yushu Prefecture is one of China’s key yak-producing regions. This trip took us to Nangqian County, where we explored the yak industry that lies at the heart of Tibetan herders’ daily lives. Trekking into the far-flung pastoral corners of the plateau, we listened closely to the stories behind the hurdles and hopes of pastoral life and development.

programme.title: The Yak and the Nomad
programme.desc: Qinghai’s Yushu Prefecture is one of China’s key yak-producing regions. This trip took us to Nangqian County, where we explored the yak industry that lies at the heart of Tibetan herders’ daily lives. Trekking into the far-flung pastoral corners of the plateau, we listened closely to the stories behind the hurdles and hopes of pastoral life and development.

programme.title: The Yak and the Nomad
programme.desc: Qinghai’s Yushu Prefecture is one of China’s key yak-producing regions. This trip took us to Nangqian County, where we explored the yak industry that lies at the heart of Tibetan herders’ daily lives. Trekking into the far-flung pastoral corners of the plateau, we listened closely to the stories behind the hurdles and hopes of pastoral life and development.

programme.title: China Bound: Tianjin
programme.desc: Tianran He explores the vibrant port city of Tianjin. Strolling through its historic quarters, he discovers how old buildings are being preserved and revitalized, and savors the rich flavors of authentic Tianjin cuisine. To work off the calories, he joins energetic retirees for a morning workout in the park, then takes in the lively nightlife along the banks of the Haihe River. From folk handicrafts on Ancient Culture Street to the National Maritime Museum and an aircraft carrier theme park, Tianran discovers that Tianjin is a truly multifacted city.

From folk handicrafts on Ancient Culture Street to the National Maritime Museum and an aircraft carrier theme park, Tianran discovers that Tianjin is a truly multifacted city.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 1
programme.desc: Nanjing, an ancient city that served as the capital of six imperial dynasties, stands as a testament to China's long-standing history and rich culture. From its Porcelain Tower - one of the Seven Wonders of the Middle Ages, to its grand city walls and ancient palaces, join us on a voyage across time to experience the echoes of history in Nanjing's storied bricks.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 1
programme.desc: Nanjing, an ancient city that served as the capital of six imperial dynasties, stands as a testament to China's long-standing history and rich culture. From its Porcelain Tower - one of the Seven Wonders of the Middle Ages, to its grand city walls and ancient palaces, join us on a voyage across time to experience the echoes of history in Nanjing's storied bricks.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the grand old mansions of Nanjing’s merchant families and take a stroll through their exquisite gardens, where Nature is incorporated into the architecture. From centuries-old Qing Dynasty residences to traditional folk handicrafts, join us on a deep dive into Nanjing’s rich cultural heritage.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the grand old mansions of Nanjing’s merchant families and take a stroll through their exquisite gardens, where Nature is incorporated into the architecture. From centuries-old Qing Dynasty residences to traditional folk handicrafts, join us on a deep dive into Nanjing’s rich cultural heritage.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 3
programme.desc: Join us in Nanjing’s bustling old quarter, where you can try on silk dresses worth their weight in gold, and see how traditional handicrafts have been given modern twists. We’ll feast on street snacks and local delicacies by the old Confucian Temple, before taking a pleasure cruise along Nanjing’s mother river to round off our exploration of this vibrant and historic city.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 3
programme.desc: Join us in Nanjing’s bustling old quarter, where you can try on silk dresses worth their weight in gold, and see how traditional handicrafts have been given modern twists. programme.title: China, Race to the Future Ep.5
programme.desc: This five-episode series explores China's growing cultural confidence, showing how a revival of traditional culture is fueling "chain reactions" that are reshaping Chinese manufacturing and development. In particular, the series stresses how China’s immense cultural capital is empowering a uniquely Chinese approach to building a future that puts openness, globalization and the environment center-stage!

programme.title: Echoes of Green
programme.desc: Echoes of Green takes viewers deep into Anji’s bamboo forests and mountain villages, where a new generation of Chinese youth is redefining how to live with nature. Through stories of outdoor sports, forest cafés, tea rituals, and family farms, the series shows how ecological ideals have become everyday choices and creative lifestyles. It is not just about landscapes, but about people — young dreamers proving that prosperity and nature can grow side by side, and that culture gives life to sustainability.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. Quyang's stone carving works are popular around different parts of China, thus also exported to over 100 countries and regions worldwide. The style of Quyang stone carving both carries the mysterious and rough spirit of the Wei Dynasty and the natural and graceful forms of the Tang and Song dynasties. It reflects the life experiences and live philosophies of local artisans. Each statue's showcases unique oriental aesthetics.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. Quyang's stone carving works are popular around different parts of China, thus also exported to over 100 countries and regions worldwide. The style of Quyang stone carving both carries the mysterious and rough spirit of the Wei Dynasty and the natural and graceful forms of the Tang and Song dynasties. It reflects the life experiences and live philosophies of local artisans. Each statue's showcases unique oriental aesthetics.

programme.title: Nanjing Yunjin Brocade: A Traditional Chinese Silk Craft
programme.desc: Nanjing Yunjin Brocade, a traditional Chinese silk handicraft with a history spanning over 1,600 years, derives its name from its radiant and resplendent hues, which resemble clouds in the sky. Renowned for its exquisite materials, meticulous weaving techniques, and vibrant, splendid patterns, Yunjin Brocade is hailed as the "king of brocades." It represents the pinnacle of Chinese silk weaving techniques, encapsulates the essence of Chinese silk craftsmanship, and stands as a brilliant crystallization of China’s silk culture. The core technique of Yunjin Brocade weaving—known as "weaving through the warp and cutting the weft"—is executed manually by two artisans working above and below...

programme.title: A Vibe of the Village: The Beat of Xiangxi Drums
programme.desc: Experience the vibrant power of Xiangxi Drum Dance. This program delves into the heart of Tujia and Miao cultures, showcasing the rhythmic beats and spirited performances that have echoed through West Hunan's mountains for centuries. Discover the stories, traditions, and raw energy of this captivating folk art.

programme.title: A Vibe of the Village: The Beat of Xiangxi Drums

programme.title: The Yak and the Nomad
programme.desc: Qinghai’s Yushu Prefecture is one of China’s key yak-producing regions. This trip took us to Nangqian County, where we explored the yak industry that lies at the heart of Tibetan herders’ daily lives. Trekking into the far-flung pastoral corners of the plateau, we listened closely to the stories behind the hurdles and hopes of pastoral life and development.

programme.title: China Bound: Tianjin
programme.desc: Tianran He explores the vibrant port city of Tianjin. Strolling through its historic quarters, he discovers how old buildings are being preserved and revitalized, and savors the rich flavors of authentic Tianjin cuisine. To work off the calories, he joins energetic retirees for a morning workout in the park, then takes in the lively nightlife along the banks of the Haihe River. From folk handicrafts on Ancient Culture Street to the National Maritime Museum and an aircraft carrier theme park, Tianran discovers that Tianjin is a truly multifacted city.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 1
programme.desc: Nanjing, an ancient city that served as the capital of six imperial dynasties, stands as a testament to China's long-standing history and rich culture. From its Porcelain Tower - one of the Seven Wonders of the Middle Ages, to its grand city walls and ancient palaces, join us on a voyage across time to experience the echoes of history in Nanjing's storied bricks.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the grand old mansions of Nanjing’s merchant families and take a stroll through their exquisite gardens, where Nature is incorporated into the architecture. From centuries-old Qing Dynasty residences to traditional folk handicrafts, join us on a deep dive into Nanjing’s rich cultural heritage.

This program delves into the heart of Tujia and Miao cultures, showcasing the rhythmic beats and spirited performances that have echoed through West Hunan's mountains for centuries. Discover the stories, traditions, and raw energy of this captivating folk art.

programme.title: The Yak and the Nomad
programme.desc: Qinghai’s Yushu Prefecture is one of China’s key yak-producing regions. This trip took us to Nangqian County, where we explored the yak industry that lies at the heart of Tibetan herders’ daily lives. Trekking into the far-flung pastoral corners of the plateau, we listened closely to the stories behind the hurdles and hopes of pastoral life and development.

programme.title: China Bound: Tianjin
programme.desc: Tianran He explores the vibrant port city of Tianjin. Strolling through its historic quarters, he discovers how old buildings are being preserved and revitalized, and savors the rich flavors of authentic Tianjin cuisine. To work off the calories, he joins energetic retirees for a morning workout in the park, then takes in the lively nightlife along the banks of the Haihe River. From folk handicrafts on Ancient Culture Street to the National Maritime Museum and an aircraft carrier theme park, Tianran discovers that Tianjin is a truly multifacted city.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 1
programme.desc: Nanjing, an ancient city that served as the capital of six imperial dynasties, stands as a testament to China's long-standing history and rich culture. From its Porcelain Tower - one of the Seven Wonders of the Middle Ages, to its grand city walls and ancient palaces, join us on a voyage across time to experience the echoes of history in Nanjing's storied bricks.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 1
programme.desc: Nanjing, an ancient city that served as the capital of six imperial dynasties, stands as a testament to China's long-standing history and rich culture. From its Porcelain Tower - one of the Seven Wonders of the Middle Ages, to its grand city walls and ancient palaces, join us on a voyage across time to experience the echoes of history in Nanjing's storied bricks.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the grand old mansions of Nanjing’s merchant families and take a stroll through their exquisite gardens, where Nature is incorporated into the architecture. From centuries-old Qing Dynasty residences to traditional folk handicrafts, join us on a deep dive into Nanjing’s rich cultural heritage.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the grand old mansions of Nanjing’s merchant families and take a stroll through their exquisite gardens, where Nature is incorporated into the architecture. From centuries-old Qing Dynasty residences to traditional folk handicrafts, join us on a deep dive into Nanjing’s rich cultural heritage.

programme.title: China Untapped: Nanjing 3
programme.desc: Join us in Nanjing’s bustling old quarter, where you can try on silk dresses worth their weight in gold, and see how traditional handicrafts have been given modern twists. We’ll feast on street snacks and local delicacies by the old Confucian Temple, before taking a pleasure cruise along Nanjing’s mother river to round off our exploration of this vibrant and historic city.

programme.title: China, Race to the Future Ep.5
programme.desc: This five-episode series explores China's growing cultural confidence, showing how a revival of traditional culture is fueling "chain reactions" that are reshaping Chinese manufacturing and development. In particular, the series stresses how China’s immense cultural capital is empowering a uniquely Chinese approach to building a future that puts openness, globalization and the environment center-stage!

programme.title: Echoes of Green
programme.desc: Echoes of Green takes viewers deep into Anji’s bamboo forests and mountain villages, where a new generation of Chinese youth is redefining how to live with nature. Through stories of outdoor sports, forest cafés, tea rituals, and family farms, the series shows how ecological ideals have become everyday choices and creative lifestyles. It is not just about landscapes, but about people — young dreamers proving that prosperity and nature can grow side by side, and that culture gives life to sustainability.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. Quyang's stone carving works are popular around different parts of China, thus also exported to over 100 countries and regions worldwide. The style of Quyang stone carving both carries the mysterious and rough spirit of the Wei Dynasty and the natural and graceful forms of the Tang and Song dynasties. It reflects the life experiences and live philosophies of local artisans. Each statue's showcases unique oriental aesthetics.

programme.title: Quyang Stone Carving
programme.desc: Quyang is known as a hometown of Chinese carving. programme.title: Nanjing Yunjin Brocade: A Traditional Chinese Silk Craft
programme.desc: Nanjing Yunjin Brocade, a traditional Chinese silk handicraft with a history spanning over 1,600 years, derives its name from its radiant and resplendent hues, which resemble clouds in the sky. Renowned for its exquisite materials, meticulous weaving techniques, and vibrant, splendid patterns, Yunjin Brocade is hailed as the "king of brocades." It represents the pinnacle of Chinese silk weaving techniques, encapsulates the essence of Chinese silk craftsmanship, and stands as a brilliant crystallization of China’s silk culture. The core technique of Yunjin Brocade weaving—known as "weaving through the warp and cutting the weft"—is executed manually by two artisans working above and below...

programme.title: Nyingchi Ep.1
programme.desc: Join Tianran He in Nyingchi, Xizang Autonomous Region. Fed by the Yarlung Zangbo River and abundant rainfall, this lush subtropical region is home to some of Xizan’g most unique scenery. From sacred mountains and ancient monasteries, to cruising along Nyingchi’s mother river, wandering alpine meadows and savoring stone pot chicken – a beloved local delicacy, Tianran uncovers the beauty of Nyingchi.

programme.title: Nyingchi Ep.2
programme.desc: In this episode, Tianran He continues his journey through Nyingchi, Xizang Autonomous Region. He meets the Lhoba people, China’s smallest ethnic group, who show him their traditional hunting attire. At a sacred lake, Tianran visits an ancient monastery and witnesses the 3000-year-old dance of the Gongbo Tibetans, before venturing to a remote village to experience their their way of life.

programme.title: Nyingchi Ep.2
