programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: In today´s episode we have the ultimate journey into the heart of Greenland´s rich culture and untamed backcountry. Join us as we explore the breathtaking landcapes of this Artic wonderland. It´s the paradise for every passionate freeskier. Let´s check out!

programme.title: Motosurf World Championship 2024

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 Profile Freeskier Nadine Wallner
programme.desc: Nadine Wallner is a freeskier, climber and mountaineer who has experienced incredible highs and devastating lows on her journey of discovery. She takes part in the Freeride World Tour, the pinnacle of freeriding competition for skiers and snowboarders.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 WOF 2025 #37: Freestyle Pro Tour 2025 - Paros (GRE)
programme.desc: The Freestyle Pro Tour 2025 stops off at the beautiful island of Paros in Greece. Crystal clear water, steady meltemi winds, and the breathtaking backdrop of the Aegean Sea set the stage for the world's best freestyle windsurfers.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _06_ World Downhill Skateboarding Champio
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2020 "Live Summary"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Freeride World Tour 2020 - #3 Andorra
programme.desc: The third part of the FWT 2020 will take place in Andorra. The Freeride World Tour is a worldwide competition of freeride snowboarding and skiing, where the best riders in the world compete against each other.

programme.title: Gordon Bennet Cup 2025 - 57min HL
programme.desc: The Gordon Bennett Cup is the oldest and most prestigious gas balloon race in the world, bringing together elite balloonists for an extraordinary test of their endurance and skill. Pilots must cope with changing winds and night flights.

programme.title: Roc d’Azur 2024
programme.desc: With the aim of bringing cycling to as many people as possible in France, CIC has become a title partner of the Roc d'Azur, Europe's leading mountain bike event, which attracts almost 100,000 enthusiasts, participants and aficionados every year!

programme.title: E-Bike World Tour 2024
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival, held in Verbier, Switzerland, from August 14-18, 2024, is Europe's premier e-mountain biking event, attracting thousands of participants and spectators. In its sixth edition, the festival features a diverse range of activities.

programme.title: WES - World E-Bike Series, UCI E-Mountainbike World Cup Cross Country, Race 3 & 4 - Germany
programme.desc: Welcome to WES rounds 3 and 4 of the UCI E-Mountainbike Cross-Country World Cup presented by Schwalbe. We are in Bielstein, Germany, for the second year in a row and the Bielstein Forest Course is the venue for this event and one of Europe's oldest motocross circuits.

programme.title: Red Bull Romaniacs 2024 - Sibiu (ROU) - 150min Leatt LiveManiacs Summary
programme.desc: In this year’s 21st edition of the event, competitors from about 60 nations will be competing, among them the world’s best hard enduro riders like Manuel Lettenbichler (GER), Graham Jarvis (UK), Wade Young (RSA), Mario Roman (ESP) and Teodor Kabakchiev (BUL).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: X-project 2.0 is a worldwide unique project where different winter sports unite in front of the backdrop of a Swiss dreamscape in the mountains of Engadin valley (Canton of Grisons).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: France is home to several geological and aquatic wonders. In autumn, the river and its gorges are the perfect setting for a competition celebrating white-water paddling. It’s the 37th edition of the International Marathon!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 World Rookie Tour Finals & Mystic Sk8 Cup
programme.desc: On today´s show we´ll be city hopping. First we drop in on Innsbruck´s World Rookie Tour Skate edition and then we´ll roll on over to Prague to the legendary skate Event known worldwide as the Mystic Cup.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: ‘Slay The Bay’ is a urban mountain bike adventure in the San Francisco Bay area. . Hans Rey, an icon in the bike scene, on this trip accompanied by fellow Freeride pioneer Brett Tippie.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - Highlight Show BMX
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - Highlight Show Skate
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E51 Swatch Timeline - This Is My Winter
programme.desc: Experience the mountain with the myth-Xavier De Le Rue. There are so many moments so many adventures so many ways of seeing the mountains. You only need a few magic days to film a part for a snowboard film. But this season it took me six months - so: This is my winter.

programme.title: 2025 WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Cheile Grădiștei Round
programme.desc: The WES UCI E-MTB XC World Cup 2025 - Cheile Grădiștei Round marks the exciting start to the season of the world's leading e-mountain bike series. Riders from all over the world will be battling for the first points in the championship standings

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 1 - Axamer Lizum (AUT)
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships in Axamer Lizum, Austria, kicked off the 2025 season from June 13 to 15. The course on the steep and technically demanding 3.3 km Hoadlstraße featured tight hairpin turns, long straights, and gradients of up to 21.8%, providing ideal conditions for high-speed racing and overtaking maneuvers.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025 - WOF 2025 _38_ World Downhill Skateboarding Champio
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships on the Isle of Man bring the world's fastest riders to one of the most challenging courses. In the “Stand Up Men” category, you can expect pure speed, fiercely contested races, and breathtaking descents.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: In a showdown between the winners from Series 1 and the powerhouse Russian Red Devils, Mario Rinaldi is in tough against Sergey Kaznovski. The Russian is reknowned for short, brutal fights, earning him a reputation as the king of the 1st round KO. This is not the first time Trevor Pragley and Andrei Semenov have met in the ring. Last time, Semenov was battered into submission, so he come into this fight hungry for revenge.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Antonio "Junior" Silva has dominated every one of his fights. Eric Pele may be the underdog, but he's riding his own winning streak. It's an earthquake when a 32-pound unstoppable force meets a 300-pound unmovable object. Roger Gracie is already at the top of the heap in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and submission wrestling, now he's fighting MMA for the first time. He puts his reputation on the line as he faces Ron Waterman.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: A well-known name on the Russian MMA circuit, this fight is Martin Malhosyan's first chance at North American exposure. Stopping this dangerous fighter won't be easy, but Mike Patt's devastating submission win from series 1 proves he's ready. Wisniewski's development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Iwan accepts a stunt challenge from world famous precision driver Russ Swift; we observe supercars trying to beat the 0-62 world record; Jonny secretly repairs the potholes that local councils refuse to.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear decides on its favourite sportscar. Which open-topped two seater offers the most fun - will it be a TVR, Lotus, or Porsche?

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Like it or not - we're a nation of speeders, and we need all the help we can get. So in this episode of Fifth Gear Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson are going to help you save your licence.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes some noise in TVR's new T350, a £40,000 coupe which promises 175mph, and 4 seconds to 60. Plus we find the ultimate bargain car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson, Tiff Needell, Tom Ford and Jason Plato take their pick from the best new cars launched in 2004. They pick an overall winner, Fifth Gear's car of the year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason & Tiff pit the new Ford Focus RS against Mitsubishi Evo X. Audi's new Lamborghini engined supercar, the R8 V10, is under scrutiny. Tom Ford examines the brand new Citroen C3 Picasso from the point of view of a truly 21st Century family man.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson test drives Volvo's new off-roader. He concludes because of their attention to safety, the environment and the family-size accommodation Volvo have created a different kind of 4x4.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato test drives the sexiest car of the moment, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage Roadster, whilst Jonny Smith tests the hire car that James Bond drove in Casino Royale, the new Ford Mondeo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear sees if there is any truth in the old cliches - who are the better drivers, men or women? Can women park? Are men better at map reading? Which is the stronger sex on the race-track?

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests he BMW M5, by driving from the UK to the famous Pau circuit in the South of France. Tom Ford tests the world's maddest car - the Ariel Atom.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato gets behind the wheel of his favourite Porsches and puts them up against some iconic competition

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to Le Mans, to race in the European version of legendary American race series NASCAR - the world's most popular motorsport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell pit three petrolhead icons against brand new, mainstream cars to find out if the classics we lust after are now outclassed by modern machines.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The team goes electric, as Jonny and Vicki test Audi's first electric model, the eTron SUV versus the Tesla Model X. And, Vicki looks at second-hand electric cars.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason hold a knock-out tournament to see if the 570hp Mercedes SLS AMG can beat its rivals from Aston Martin, Bentley and Jaguar. Jonny meets Swedish rally legend Stig Blomquist for some ice driving lessons in the new Audi A1 Quattro.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: A Land Rover Defender 90 versus a Suzuki Jimny, and in the shoot-out: Volkswagen Up GTI versus a Suzuki Swift Sport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason is in Iceland being taught how to race a brutal Formula Off-Road buggy up a cliff of volcanic rock by a former champion. Tiff is joined by former Le Mans winner Guy Smith to test a new version of Bentley's best selling car - the Continental GT.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this special rally themed show, Jason Plato and Tiff Needell swap race track for rally stage as they learn to master the art of rally driving. They're taught advanced driving skills by triple British Rally Champion Mark Higgins

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff gets behind the wheel of the £300,000 Lexus LFA hypercar, Jason pits the brand-new Mercedes E63AMG super saloon against the legendary Audi RS6 and Vicki gets her geek on as she samples the wealth of technology in the brand-new BMW 5 Series.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason celebrate the 100th anniversary of Aston Martin. Jason drives James Bond's DB5 from Skyfall and learns from the the master craftsmen at the company's heritage centre, while Tiff tests the brand new Rapide S four door supercar

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson, Tiff Needell, Tom Ford and Jason Plato take their pick from the best new cars launched in 2004. They pick an overall winner, Fifth Gear's car of the year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato drives the very special Subaru Litchfield Type 25. Tiff Needell drives the Ferrari 599 1,000 miles on the most treacherous roads in the world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff races the top of the range £60,000 supercharged Sport cross country against...a horse. Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out exactly how easy it is to control the £160,000 Lamborghini Murcielago.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff heads to Anglesey for not one but two Shoot-Outs, the Porsche Cayenne goes head to head with the BMW X5 and the Renault Clio takes on the Honda Civic.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: What do you think is more dangerous - driving whilst being drunk, or driving whilst being tired? Tiff Needell spends a day in the pub and Quentin Willson deprives himself of sleep for 2 days.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell employs the help of two models to test the theory that the quicker you drive a convertible, the less your hair blows. He blasts the brand new Bentley Continental GTC up to 150mph.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford takes puts the Grande Punto Abarth through its hot hatch paces. Tim Shaw finds out if it's possible to save huge amounts of money by servicing your car yourself. Bruno Senna joins the programme as a special guest presenter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear Vicki Butler-Henderson drives the one-off supercharged Nissan Murano GTC; Jonny Smith challenges the world's biggest lawnmower to a head to head in a grass cutting contest.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is taught how to drive a car on two wheels; Jonny Smith gets to be a real live human crash test dummy when he visits Germany for some extreme airbag testing.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the Lotus Elise S is the best track car for novices - by giving the keys to her sister; Le Mans winner Guy Smith races the fastest van on sale today.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the latest version of the car that is perennially voted one of Britain's favourite cars - the Land Rover Defender. Jonny Smith celebrates Ferrari's 60th Birthday.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato pitches a lunatic Honda Civic Mugen RR imported from Japan against a Honda S2000 sports car from the UK. Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC v Mercedes CLS. Tiff Needell takes to the track to test the brand new KTM X-Bow.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell takes two coupes onto the Fifth Gear track - the Mazda RX8 and Nissan 350Z. Vicki Butler-Henderson spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton. Tom Ford is the lucky man behind the wheel of the facelifted Mercedes SL63 AMG.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason pits the brand-new Renault Sport Clio 200 against a tough competitor from the past - the Renault Clio 182 Cup. Retired Formula One driver, and current TV pundit David Coulthard, meets up with Tiff Needell for an extreme van driving challenge

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In a superb world first, Tiff Needell gets to drive a Williams Formula 1 Grand Prix car. With exclusive access to the team we're allowed to follow Tiff every step of the way.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Nissan's new Micra. He finds it well-made and easy-to-drive. Adrian Simpson goes in search haunted cars. He starts by being very sceptical that haunted cars can exist at all.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Tom decide which is best, a diesel Mini or petrol one; Tiff compares the new Subaru Impeza to a previous version and Vicki discovers which is quickest, the British or Japanese version of the Honda Civic Type R.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason takes two sporty convertibles - the Mini Cooper Cabriolet and Mazda MX-5 onto the track for a hair-do busting shootout. Tim Shaw heads to a garage...with no mechanics! Tiff spends some quality time in the brand new Aston Martin V12 Vantage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson road tests the new Hyundai Coupé. It was massively praised by motoring journalists on its launch it Italy. They even likened the £14,000 South Korean car to a mini Ferrari 456.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes on a rather expensive road trip - in a £250,000 Rolls Royce Phantom. Tom Ford is testing the new Porsche Cayenne Turbo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason & Tiff pit the new Ford Focus RS against Mitsubishi Evo X. Audi's new Lamborghini engined supercar, the R8 V10, is under scrutiny. Tom Ford examines the brand new Citroen C3 Picasso from the point of view of a truly 21st Century family man.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out what's quickest in the Shoot-Out feature - the brand new Audi S5 or the BMW 335i; England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato; Jonny Smith tests a potential revolution in city transport

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this special episode of the programme we reveal the winners of the Fifth Gear Awards 2006. There will be prizes for Best Small Car, Best Family Car, Best Fast Car and the overall Car of the Year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Adrian Simpson get under the skin of bullet-proof cars and go to the secret lab that the world's leading car armourer uses for weapons testing, and race an armoured Range Rover.

programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson learns the skills needed to drive in the Special Forces, from former Royal Marine sniper Aldo Kane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Journey to the Duelist Kingdom
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister’s eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi’s deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Into The Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they’ve ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he’s to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Ultimate Great Moth
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil’s first wave of Duel Monsters, Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power every turn! Can Yugi find a way to destroy this winged beast before it destroys him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai’s secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Attack from the Deep
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp’s crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba’s brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother’s company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Duel With a Ghoul
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba. But with his best cards resting at the bottom of the ocean, Yugi must discover a new strategy to survive fake Kaiba’s powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Give up the Ghost
programme.desc: Yugi defeats Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends’ help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own. But as Rex Raptor’s relentless dinos destroys Joey’s best Duel Monsters, will Tristan’s card remind him that with his friends, he is never alone in battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E129 Fists of Fury: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral's race to face Don Thousand is stopped cold by the hot-blooded Alito, now brainwashed by the Barian deity! Can they think fast enough to free Alito of Don Thousand, or will he take the two down for the count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E130 Fists of Fury: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral duel desperately to try and turn an old enemy into their newest ally, but with Don Thousand in Alito’s corner, Yuma and Astral find themselves up against the ropes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Vector sets his sights on squashing Marin and Dumon, and there’s nothing Shark can do but watch his sister and best friend squirm before his eyes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The thunderous battle between Marin, Dumon and Vector shatters expectations as it nears its startling end! Meanwhile, Alito stands tall against his former friend, the Barian behemoth - Girag!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Marin's duel with Vector charges to its climactic conclusion! Can Marin outduel this venomous villain, or will Vector remain invincible?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The long foreshadowed faceoff is finally here! Kite and Mizar go toe-to-toe to settle who is the one true Galaxy-Eyes master!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The fierce face-off between Kite and Mizar soars to new heights as their battle to determine the one true Galaxy-Eyes master roars to a finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Nash races to face Vector, but with Vector's enhanced strength, he may be speeding towards his own demise!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E137 Clash of the Emperors
programme.desc: While Nash and Vector's danger-fueled duel hits dizzying new heights of havoc, the truth behind Vector’s dark past is revealed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma teams up with an unlikely ally to take down the great Barian deity, Don Thousand! Can this twosome draw out a victory, or will Don Thousand douse any hope these heroes have of being victorious?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark’s battle with Don Thousand takes a treacherous turn when the great Barian deity reveals he can rewrite their cards into entirely different cards! Can Yuma and Shark defeat a foe who can change their every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E140 A Thousand Ways to Lose
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark turn the tides and put Don Thousand on the brink of defeat, but DonThousand still has a thousand tricks up his sleeve!

programme.sub-title: S04 : E37 A Duel With Dartz!, Part 5
programme.desc: Kaiba’s soul has been captured, leaving the Pharaoh all alone to fend for himself against the invincible forces of Dartz and the Orichalcos!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S04 : E38 A Duel With Dartz!, Part 6
programme.desc: Dartz calls forth Divine Serpent Geh, a sinister snake with infinite attack points! Yugi counters by joining the three legendary dragon knights into the mighty Timaeus the Knight of Destiny, but is that enough to combat a monster with limitless strength?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S04 : E39 Rise of the Great Beast, Part 1
programme.desc: All the monsters of Earth join forces with the survivors of the monster domain for an epic showdown with the fate of both worlds hanging in the balance!

programme.sub-title: S04 : E40 Rise of the Great Beast, Part 2
programme.desc: Grand Dragon Leviathan’s thunderous roars unleash hundred-foot tall waves worldwide to destroy every town and city on Earthy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is trapped inside the Duel Dome, and the only way to escape is by defeating the Duel Computer!

programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Let the Games Begin!, Part 1

programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Down in Flames, Part 1

programme.sub-title: S05 : E11 One Step Ahead, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.desc: Realizing that they’ve become part of a real-life version of the Capsule Monsters board game, the gang struggles to find a way out.

programme.desc: Reunited at last, Yugi and his friends rejoice.

programme.desc: Grandpa translates an ancient stone tablet which directs the gang to locate the “Fortress of Fear.”

programme.desc: It’s on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Can Jack Atlas best Sergey, when Sergey combines the best of man and machine?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters... the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon! What chance does Yugi’s band of mortal monsters have against an Egyptian God?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spell Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand, so Strings’s Slifer the Sky Dragon can grow to infinite attack power! Can Yugi discover Slifer’s one fatal flaw before he’s annihilated by tens of thousands of attack points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts! If Joey wins, he’ll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye! However, little does Joey realize that he has bigger problems than this duel; the Rare Hunters are closing in on his location…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako’s oceanic warrior The Legendary Fisherman unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey’s monsters from the depths of the sea! Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he’s all washed out!

programme.desc: Abductions abound! Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Téa! To make matters worse, the Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper! The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E22 Double Duel, Part 2: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba’s tumultuous teamwork! Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they’re sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Double Duel, Part 3: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it’s too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius, a monstrous menace even more powerful than Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.sub-title: S03 : E141 The Fate of Three Worlds

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Having gathered all one hundred Numbers, Astral is finally prepared to fulfill his mission – to destroy Barian World! But in order to see his mission through, Astral will have to destroy his friendship with Yuma first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The battle between Yuma and Astral rages on as the best of friends become the fiercest of foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 A Blast from the Past, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei finally manages to meet Jack in New Domino. Here, they hold a Turbo Duel with Yusei's "Stardust Dragon" on the line. Yusei is determine to have his card back and get his revenge on his former friend.

programme.desc: Yusei continues his Turbo Duel with Jack after Jack has managed to Summon both their aces "Red Dragon Archfiend" and "Stardust Dragon". Yusei is able to gain control of "Stardust Dragon" with "Harmonia Mirror". But unknown to them, the summoning of the two dragons trigger an event that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Yusei Fudo has been caught by the Sector Security and sent to the Facility. In the paddy wagon, he meets a man called Tenzen Yanagi whom he befriends. The former Pro Duelist, Bolt Tanner, meets Yusei there. Tanner challenges Yusei, who is unable to Duel since he doesn't have a Deck. As a result, Yanagi Duels in his place.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: Disgusted by Tanner speaking ill of Yanagi's cards and stomping on them, Yusei Duels Tanner using Yanagi's Deck, in order to teach him that no card is truly unneeded (in the dub he wanted to teach him what respect really means).

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5 D's
programme.desc: The Securities examine Yusei's body for confirmation of his Mark of the Dragon. Meanwhile, Jack has learned of the legend of the Crimson Dragon and forces himself to obey Goodwin and hosts a Turbo Duel between him and Hunter Pace, who wants a rematch with him.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Heart of the Cards
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi’s Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa’s soul as his prize!

programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, yearning and prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game!

programme.sub-title: S05 : E52 The Final Duel, Part 4

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Swing Into Action- Part 1
programme.desc: Yuya Sakaki aims to become an "Entertainment Duelist". He practices dueling every day alongside his childhood friend, Yuzu. One day, he receives a challenge for an exhibition match from the Pro Duelist, "Strong Ishijima". Although Yuya excitedly fends off his attacks in their Action Duel, he's eventually pushed into a corner.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Swing Into Action- Part 2
programme.desc: With The Sledgehammer set to strike, Yuya uses Pendulum power to swing the duel his way! Can this phenomenal new summoning method help Yuya hammer the Hammer?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: It could be curtains for Yuya when a rival student cons him out of his Pendulum Cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Still shocked by Sylvio's Pendulum Summon, Yuya must find his focus if he wants to save his friends from a 100-story drop!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Journey to the Duelist Kingdom
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister’s eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi’s deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Into The Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they’ve ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he’s to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Ultimate Great Moth
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil’s first wave of Duel Monsters, Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power every turn! Can Yugi find a way to destroy this winged beast before it destroys him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai’s secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Attack from the Deep
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp’s crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba’s brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother’s company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Duel With a Ghoul
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba. But with his best cards resting at the bottom of the ocean, Yugi must discover a new strategy to survive fake Kaiba’s powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Give up the Ghost
programme.desc: Yugi defeats Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends’ help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own. But as Rex Raptor’s relentless dinos destroys Joey’s best Duel Monsters, will Tristan’s card remind him that with his friends, he is never alone in battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Joey must figure out the secret of Yugi’s gift, the Time Wizard card, without Yugi’s help or he’s taking the next boat out of Duelist Kingdom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Evil Spirit of the Ring
programme.desc: Yugi’s classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring’s dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves! Not only must Yugi battle to avoid becoming a permanent part of the card game, but also free Bakura’s soul from the Millennium Ring’s control!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 The Light at the End of the Tunnel
programme.desc: Pegasus’s hired duelist PaniK cheats Mai of all her Star Chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when PaniK’s Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes PaniK: “I’ll finish you in three turns.” Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 The Scars of Defeat
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus! Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba’s Blue-Eyes White Dragon and Joey’s Red-Eyes B. Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Arena of Lost Souls, Part 1
programme.desc: The #1 American duelist Bandit Keith’s gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith’s zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave! Joey is all alone in the battle this time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Arena of Lost Souls, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey’s last ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith’s zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Double Trouble Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the labyrinth cave, Yugi and friends find an alternate exit, but the door is guarded by Pegasus’s Paradox Brothers. Yugi and Joey will no longer be battling solo; they band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers! The battle for all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus’s castle is on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Double Trouble Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey pool their strengths and manage to fend off their opponents’ monsters, but things are about to change as the Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Double Trouble Duel, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, Summoned Skull and Red-Eyes B. Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of Gate Guardian. Individually, our heroes have no chance, but they will unleash the greatest power of all: teamwork!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the magic of the Millennium Eye, Pegasus traps Mokuba’s soul inside a card right before Kaiba’s eyes! In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi’s heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his Star Chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Téa bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra Star Chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Champion Vs. Creator, Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba’s soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people’s minds. Can Kaiba defeat an opponent who knows his moves even before he does?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Champion Vs. Creator, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus’s Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba’s soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba! Yugi has had enough!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: T’was the night before the final battle, and many creatures are stirring! Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus’s secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus’s weighty glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish tactical errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the intense pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: The new kid in town drives Yuya bananas when he begs Yuya to be his duel teacher! Unfortunately for Yuya, this blue-haired battler won't give up until Yuya gives in!

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.desc: Jonathan must help his own widow regain her love for life.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cold-hearted businessman is given the opportunity to relive the last week of his life. And he tries to do the right thing this time.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A runaway dog unites a boy in an orphanage with its human family.

programme.desc: The orphan boy has formed an attachment to the dog, although he is going away to living with a new foster family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A trainer is reminded of his own shady past when a fighter he's been mentoring is asked to take a fall.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Halloween, Jonathan helps a little boy get over his fears and in the process get even with his sister!

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan casts a retired comic and his movie-star son in a play about a father and son who never got to know each other.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his wife when she passes away.

programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his wife when she passes away.

programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Liukuvirta lähettää Andromedan ajassa taaksepäin juuri ennen Kansainyhteisön kaatumista. Miehistön on puututtava asiaan säilyttääkseen historian.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Hätäkutsuun vastaaminen johtaa miehistön hakemaan Bekan veljen, joka on nykyään Wayist, ja hänen ystävänsä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka saa tietää, että hänen isänsä entinen liikekumppani myy erittäin riippuvuutta aiheuttavaa huumetta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää sisaraluksensa Pax Magellanicin. Paxin miehistö on 300 vuotta vanha... mutta ei ole ikääntynyt päivässä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr syöksyy Eureka Maru -aluksella maahan Nietzscheanin planeetalla ja menettää muistinsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper saa tiedon lahjan kuolevalta Perseidiltä, mutta huomaa, että Perseidiä etsi palkkionmetsästäjä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedaan nousee Consensus of Partsin, myyttisen mekaanisen yhteiskunnan, lennokki. Aluksi drone on ystävällinen, mutta yrittää pakottaa aluksen liittymään Konsensukseen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex on palannut, ja hän vaatii Trancen ja Harperin apua uudessa suunnitelmassaan: Tarn-Vedran löytämisessä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ja pastori Bem auttavat rauhanomaista yhteiskuntaa vastustamaan mahdollisia orjakauppiaita, mutta heidän on oltava varovaisia.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan yrittää tuoda rauhaa kahteen eri Nietzschean ylpeyteen saattamalla toisen prinsessan järjestettyyn avioliittoon toisen prinssin kanssa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka vie Andromedan Tarn-Vedraan, mutta pitkä aika liukuvirrassa aiheuttaa sivuvaikutuksia. Niiden torjumiseksi Beka alkaa käyttää Flashia ja jää pian koukkuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Vanha muisto Andromedalta aktivoituu vahingossa, mikä lähettää hänet tehtävään ja jättää Dylanin miehistön ohella kykenemättömäksi kumoamaan komennon.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylanin ja Rommien on pelastettava Tyr, Harper ja Rev Magogin maailmalaivalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev ja Tyr syöksyvät maahan paettuaan nietzscheläisten jengiä, mutta kohtaavat pian uuden uhan: Revin tarve saada ruokaa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda vastaa hätäkutsuun, kun rahtialuksen kimppuun hyökätään.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö etsii kauan kadoksissa ollutta kansainyhteisön johtajaa, joka on mennyt piiloon.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka ja Trance lähtevät Rommien kanssa ottamaan selvää aseesta, jota kehitetään planeetalla, joka ei luota tekoälyyn.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan tehtävänä on saattaa lääkintäaluksia turvallisesti Drago-Kazovin avaruuden läpi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylanin entisen morsiamen johtama Kansainyhteisön selviytyjistä koostuva planeetta kutsutaan liittymään uuteen Kansainyhteisöön.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun he pelastavat nuoren prinssin kapinasta, joka tappaa hänen perheensä, Dylania ja Tyriä pyydetään hänen neuvonantajikseen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ja hänen uusi Kansainyhteisön laivastonsa ottavat vastaan Drago-Kazovin laivaston, mutta huomaavat sen olevan paljon odotettua suurempi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harperin Magogin munat alkavat kuoriutua, joten ryhmä rakentaa Teseract-koneen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ottaa haltuunsa turistiproomun yrittäessään paeta palkkasotureita.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda pelastaa kuolevia ihmisiä ajelehtimasta, mutta he muuttuvat pian zombeiksi, joita hallitsee pesämieli.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Luomisen moottori pystyy kirjoittamaan maailmankaikkeuden uudelleen omistajan toiveiden mukaisesti.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Musta aukko tyrmää Dylanin ja lähettää hänet vaihtoehtoiseen todellisuuteen, jossa hänellä on vaimo ja lapsi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pelastaa yhden kauan kadonneista Commonwealth-perustajista, mutta huomaa, että hänellä voi olla enemmän ongelmia kuin hän on arvoltaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan yrittää vapauttaa vangittujen alusten laivaston, mutta laivasto ei ole varma, haluaako se tulla vapautetuksi. Niiden tekoälyt pelkäävät, että uudet kapteenit orjuuttavat ne.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka ja Tyr joutuvat ulottuvuustunnelin energian valtaan. Dylanin, Trancen ja Harperin on pelastettava heidät ennen kuin he tuhoavat aluksen.
